overview: SRM University AP, located in Neerukonda, Mangalagiri Mandal, Amaravati, Andhra Pradesh, is a premier private university established in 2017 by the SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST) Trust. Situated in the capital region of Andhra Pradesh, the university is known for its modern infrastructure designed by international architects, globally qualified faculty, strong research ecosystem, international collaborations, and startup incubation initiatives.
accreditation: Private University established under Andhra Pradesh State Legislature; recognized by UGC.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech Core Branches (Civil, Mechanical, EEE, Semiconductor)
B.Tech via AP EAPCET Convener Quota

placements.placementRate: 100% for eligible and registered B.Tech students; Core Engineering branches achieved 100% placement
placements.marqueeOffers: 13 students secured Rs. 40+ LPA packages; 60 students secured Rs. 20+ LPA packages

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on SRMJEEE ranks or AP EAPCET counseling depending on the admission category and quota.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow SRMJEEE phase schedules and AP EAPCET counseling timelines.

scholarships.name: SRM Founder's Merit Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: 100% tuition fee and hostel fee waiver for top SRMJEEE rank holders and outstanding board performers

scholarships.name: SRMJEEE Rank-Based Scholarship
scholarships.benefit: 25% - 75% tuition fee concession based on entrance rank percentile

scholarships.name: M.Tech Fellowship
scholarships.benefit: Rs. 6,000 monthly stipend for eligible M.Tech students

campus.location: Neerukonda, Mangalagiri Mandal, Amaravati, Andhra Pradesh
campus.specialNote: The campus infrastructure is internationally designed with strong emphasis on research, innovation, entrepreneurship, and global academic collaborations.

contact.address: SRM University AP, Neerukonda, Mangalagiri Mandal, Amaravati, Andhra Pradesh, India
